subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam-Riḍá! Hast thou heard My tidings, and hast thou recognized that which hath been made manifest in My days, and hast thou heard of Mine exile and tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام رضا هل سمعت نبای و هل عرفت ما ظهر فی ایامی و هل سمعت غربتی و کربتی و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution
